claims.evidence_text: The highest values of plant height and spike length (93.2 and 9.3 cm) were achieved by the application of 100% DBS as compared to untreated plots ( Table 5 ).
claims.claim_summary: Maximum wheat plant height of 93.2 cm achieved with 100% dry bio-slurry application (residual effect) in potato-wheat rotation.
claims.management_system: organic dry bio-slurry, rain-fed, potato-wheat rotation

claims.evidence_text: Potato and wheat production under a crop rotation system is commonly practiced by farmers in the Amhara region. The system comprises a cradle-to-farm analysis for a 3-years rotation cycle.
claims.claim_summary: Wheat grown in a 3-year potato-wheat crop rotation system, with wheat as the rotating crop following potato.

claims.evidence_text: For wheat recommended NP was applied in all plots except control which only received P 2 O 5 to see the residual effect of dry bio-slurry in the next crop and nitrogen was supplied, in two splits.
claims.claim_summary: Nitrogen for wheat supplied in two splits.
